title: Remove Gallery section content wrapper from Gallery.tsx

requirements.text: In frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx, completely remove any remaining content wrapper div and all its children from the Gallery section. The component should render only a minimal shell (e.g., the outer section element with an id for anchor linking) with no visible image cards, grid containers, headings nested inside content wrappers, or any other child content. Strip all JSX inside the section down to nothing — or at minimum remove every div, card, image, and text element that is currently rendering visible content inside the Gallery section on the page.

quotes: It is still there please remove

acceptanceCriteria: The Gallery section on the live page displays no image cards, grid layouts, or content wrapper divs.
Gallery.tsx contains no nested content wrapper divs with gallery card children.
The page renders without errors after the removal.
No visible gallery content appears between the MoreThanMusic and Testimonials sections.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any other section components — only Gallery.tsx.
nonGoals: Adding new gallery images or placeholder content.
Restructuring any section other than Gallery.
